---
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
---
```{r}
data(mtcars)
head(mtcars)
```

```{r}
pca_mtcars <- prcomp(mtcars, scale. = TRUE)
summary(pca_mtcars)
```

```{r}
pca_mtcars$sdev^2
```

```{r}
pca_mtcars$rotation
```

```{r}
head(pca_mtcars$x)
```

```{r}
plot(pca_mtcars, type = "l")
```

```{r}
library(factoextra)
fviz_pca_biplot(pca_mtcars,
                label = "var",
                repel = TRUE)
```
